index.empty_body: Abrigo hedging instruments will become available once contracts are deployed on-chain. This page will update automatically.

risk.heading: Hedging product — not leverage
risk.body: Abrigo is designed to hedge against currency and macroeconomic exposure. It does not amplify gains or losses: it is a convex hedging instrument, not a leveraged product.

wallet.disconnected_prompt: Connect wallet to view your position
wallet.wrong_chain_explanation: You're on {chain}. Abrigo operates on Celo, Ethereum, Base, Arbitrum, and Optimism.

pool.not_deployed: No pool data available — contract not yet deployed.

errors.not_found: This instrument does not exist or is not yet available.
errors.route_error: Something went wrong loading this page.
